message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "BL1 common code" #LightGray
    participant bl1_main
    participant bl_common
end box

box "arm platform code" #lightblue
    participant fvp_bl1_setup
    participant arm_bll_setup as arm_bl1_setup
    participant arm_io_storage
end box

box "platform common code" #LightGrey
    participant plat_bl1_common
    participant fconf
end box


bl1_main ->>fvp_bl1_setup :  bll_platform_setup() 
activate fvp_bl1_setup  
   fvp_bl1_setup->>arm_bl1_setup: arm_bll_platform_setup ()   
      activate arm_bl1_setup    
         arm_bl1_setup->>arm_io_storage:plat_arm_io_setup()\nregister and setup flp\n         
            activate arm_io_storage            
               deactivate arm_io_storage               
                  arm_bl1_setup-->fconf:fconf_load_config()\ncreate and populate an \nimagedesc_t for FW_CONFIG                  
                     activate fconf                     
                        fconf-->>bl_common:load_auth_image(FW CONFIG ID &image_info)\n load and auth image from flip \nwith info from platio_policy                        
                           activate bl_common                            
                              bl_common -->fconf:FCONF_GET_PROPERTY(arm, armllo_policies tb_fw_cfg) use staticaly defined policies in bli                               
                                 activate fconf                                
                                    fconf -- >>bl_common:image_inf o get tbfwconfigdtbfrom imagelnfo                                    
                                       deactivate fconff                                     
                                        deactivat eblcommon                                        
                                          end                                          
                                            alt                                             
                                               group                                               
                                                  loop                                                 
                                                     par                                                      
                                                        rect                                                         
                                                           note right                                                     
                                                              set epinfo.args.argO of BL2_IMAGE_DESC toFWCONFIG base address                                                           
                                                               endnote                                                                        
                                                                  else                                                                           
                                                                     opt                                                                               
                                                                        try                                                                                   
                                                                           break                                                                                
                                                                              finally                                                                              
                                                                                 assert                                                                                 
                                                                                    critical                                                                                    
                                                                                        partition                                                                                       
                                                                                            hgroup                                                                                          
                                                                                                frame                                                                                             
                                                                                                   package                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                          
@enduml
